title: isodon striatus
intro: Isodon striatus, also known as Chinese sage, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Isodon striatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. Isodon striatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
